title: Piglet Structures
description: Over 100 structures with multiple variants, 235 custom items, 90+ custom blocks and 30+ mobs
body:
## Introduction

💎DO YOU LIKE SEEKING TREASURE?💎

🧭WANT TO ADD MORE VARIETY TO YOUR EXPLORATION?🧭

⚔️ADD THIS TO YOUR MODPACK!⚔️

## Features 

- explore and find **over 100 structures** from small ruins up to complex dungeons
- the structures have **multiple variants** and are built out of **over 850 jigsaw segments**
- huge part of the structures have **treasure chests with unique loot tables and custom items**
- gather the **235 custom items** including **curio baubles** and **special weapons**
- find and gather over **90 custom blocks** to decorate your base
- find and defeat over **30 unique animated mobs including a boss**
- the mod supports [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- **full compatibility** with numerous **biome mods** (list below)

## Requirements

- [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

## Configuration
If you are making a modpack with multiple structure mods and want the Piglet Structures' structures to be far less common use this version instead:
- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/piglet-structures-modpack-edition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/piglet-structures-modpack-edition)

## WIKI

[https://piglet-structures.fandom.com/wiki/Piglet_Structures_Wiki](https://piglet-structures.fandom.com/wiki/Piglet_Structures_Wiki)

## Compatibility

The structures are fully compatible via precise biome tags with the following biome mods:

- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)
- [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
- [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium)

For the list of tagged biomes click [here](https://piglet-structures.fandom.com/wiki/Biome_tags).

## Donation

If you want to support me and help me creating even more mods consider buying me a coffee... or a fruit shake or a pizza ;D ...or whatever will I be eating at the moment xDD

[https://ko-fi.com/lordddiamond](https://ko-fi.com/lordddiamond)

## Modpacks

Yeah, you can use it in your modpack! 😇

For all detailed info on the mod elements including tags checkout the [WIKI](https://piglet-structures.fandom.com/wiki/Piglet_Structures_Wiki).
